market_regime: Risk-on rally: VIX -27% to 17.49, SPY +4.9% / QQQ +6.3% 20d; Iran-Qatar LNG supply shock + China rare earth controls structurally re-price energy/critical minerals; tech leads, rates elevated, tariff escalation is the tail risk

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner missed Coterra merger catalyst + $1B synergies + 8.8x fwd P/E + Morgan Stanley/Truist fresh upgrades — requires connecting merger arbitrage with operational upside
Scanner missed the geopolitically-driven structural supply shock (Iran→Qatar force majeure→Cheniere pricing power) — required connecting active geopolitical events with fundamental positioning
Scanner missed IPG post-merger synergy doubling + $5B buyback (23% of MCap) + 18% FCF yield at 6.3x P/E — scanner filters likely exclude advertising agencies
Scanner missed RSI 16.9 (lowest in S&P 500) + Guggenheim upgrade — required combining oversold technicals with fundamental quality research
Scanner missed defensive compounder raising 2026 EBITDA guidance to $37-37.5B with $18B+ FCF and 30%+ discount to analyst consensus
CEO direct personal purchase on April 16 (yesterday) at 52-week lows — very recent Form 4 that scanner's batch processing missed on timing
Novo Nordisk partnership announcement resolves core regulatory bear case — narrative resolution event the fundamental scanner cannot surface
Shah Capital activist demanding strategic sale at $5-10B vs $1.4B market cap — event-driven catalyst invisible to fundamental screeners that see only negative FCF
China rare earth export controls + DoD $1.55B partnership required a geopolitical filter that the fundamental screener doesn't apply
